cloth.name: Cloth
cloth.examples: Cloth armor, heavy jacket, sack, tent

glass.name: Glass
glass.examples: Glass block, glass table, heavy vase

wood.name: Wood
wood.examples: Chest, simple door, table, tree trunk

iron.name: Iron or steel
iron.examples: Anvil, iron or steel armor, stove

broken-effect.label: Broken {itemName}
broken-effect.description: Mechanical penalties applied for a broken {itemName}

destroyed-effect.label: Destroyed: {itemName}
destroyed-effect.description: {itemName} is completely destroyed and provides no benefits.

persistent-damage.name: Persistent damage: {itemName}
persistent-damage.desc: Takes {formula} {type} damage at the end of the turn.

npc.select-penalty: Select the mechanical penalties to apply to this creature for breaking their {itemName}
npc.title: Broken gear

repair.title: Repair {itemName}
repair.restores-info: (Default success restores {baseHeal} HP. Crit restores {critHeal} HP)

automation.weapon-prompt-body: Critical failure with {weaponName}. Enter rolled damage to apply against this weapon's hardness:
automation.armor-physical-prompt: {actorName} lost {damage} HP. Was the incoming damage physical (bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing) and should it damage armor durability?
automation.shield-block-prompt-body: {actorName} uses Shield Block with {shieldName}. Enter incoming damage before hardness:

weapon.damage: {itemName} takes {damage} durability damage from critical-failure backlash ({rawDamage} rolled vs Hardness {hardness}). Remaining HP: {currentHp} / {maxHp}.
weapon.no-damage: {itemName} takes no durability damage from critical-failure backlash ({rawDamage} rolled vs Hardness {hardness}).

armor.damage: {itemName} takes {damage} durability damage from HP spillover ({rawDamage} HP below {threshold}% threshold vs Hardness {hardness}). Remaining HP: {currentHp} / {maxHp}.
armor.no-damage: {itemName} takes no durability damage from HP spillover ({rawDamage} HP below {threshold}% threshold vs Hardness {hardness}).

shield-block.content: Shield Block: {actorName} blocks with {itemName}. Incoming {incomingDamage}, Hardness {hardness}, shield takes {shieldDamage}, actor takes {actorDamage}. Shield HP: {shieldCurrentHp} / {shieldMaxHp}.

notifications.cant-equip: {itemName} is destroyed and cannot be equipped
notifications.cant-stow: {containerName} is destroyed and cannot hold any items
notifications.corrosive-added: Added {dmg} acid damage to sunder from corrosive rune!
notifications.no-target: Please select a target token first to sunder their gear.
notifications.no-items: The target actor has no valid items to sunder.
notifications.fully-repaired: This item is already at maximum HP.
notifications.persistent-ended: {itemName} is no longer taking persistent damage.
notifications.no-actor-repair: No actor found to perform the repair.
notifications.no-crafting-skill: This actor does not have a Crafting skill.
notifications.no-raised-shield: {actorName} has no raised shield available for Shield Block automation.

showInventoryUI.name: Show inventory interface
showInventoryUI.hint: Display the durability tracking numbers and damage controls directly on the main inventory rows.

showRepairButtonUI.name: Show repair button in inventory
showRepairButtonUI.hint: Display the wrench icon to quickly repair item HP based on Crafting proficiency.

injectSunderButton.name: Inject chat card sunder button
injectSunderButton.hint: Adds a quick-access sunder button to damage chat cards that automatically reads the rolled damage.

allowPlayersSunderButton.name: Allow players to use chat sunder
allowPlayersSunderButton.hint: If enabled, non-GM players will also see and be able to click the chat card sunder button.

showDamageButtonUI.name: Show damage controls in inventory
showDamageButtonUI.hint: Display the damage hammer icon on the inventory rows.

showAssignMaterialButtonUI.name: Show material button in inventory
showAssignMaterialButtonUI.hint: Display the 'M' button for assigning custom materials on the inventory rows.

showTrackDurabilityButtonUI.name: Show track durability button
showTrackDurabilityButtonUI.hint: Display the button to start tracking durability for mundane items in the inventory.

enableArmourPenalty.name: Enable broken armour penalties
enableArmourPenalty.hint: Apply a status penalty to armour class when defensive gear drops below the broken threshold.

armourPenaltyLight.name: Light armour penalty
armourPenaltyLight.hint: The penalty amount applied to broken light armour.

armourPenaltyMedium.name: Medium armour penalty
armourPenaltyMedium.hint: The penalty amount applied to broken medium armour.

armourPenaltyHeavy.name: Heavy armour penalty
armourPenaltyHeavy.hint: The penalty amount applied to broken heavy armour.

laminarPenaltyReduction.name: Laminar trait armour penalty reduction
laminarPenaltyReduction.hint: The amount by which to reduce the armour penalty for laminar armours. For example, if set to 1, a broken laminar light armour would take one less penalty, up to 0 penalty.

showForPlayers.name: └ Show for players as well
showForPlayers.hint: If enabled, non-GM players will also see this element on their inventory sheets.

enableWeaponPenalty.name: Enable broken weapon penalties
enableWeaponPenalty.hint: Apply an item penalty to attack and damage rolls when a weapon drops below the broken threshold.

weaponPenaltyAmount.name: Weapon penalty amount
weaponPenaltyAmount.hint: The specific numeric penalty applied to broken weapons.

enableCritFailWeaponDamagePC.name: Homebrew: Crit-fail weapon damage (PCs)
enableCritFailWeaponDamagePC.hint: On critical-failure attack rolls, prompt for damage and apply it to the used weapon after Hardness. Recommendation if enabled: broken weapon penalty -1.

enableCritFailWeaponDamageNPC.name: Homebrew: Crit-fail weapon damage (NPCs)
enableCritFailWeaponDamageNPC.hint: Same as PCs, but for NPC attacks.

enableArmorDamageFromHpPC.name: Homebrew: Armor damage from HP hits (PCs)
enableArmorDamageFromHpPC.hint: Damage that reaches HP can also damage equipped armor (not shields), after armor Hardness. Recommendation if enabled: light/medium/heavy broken armor penalties all -1.

enableArmorDamageFromHpNPC.name: Homebrew: Armor damage from HP hits (NPCs)
enableArmorDamageFromHpNPC.hint: NPC HP damage can also damage equipped armor (not shields), after armor Hardness. NPCs always use the NPC threshold setting.

armorDamageUseStaminaForPC.name: Homebrew: PC armor damage assumes Stamina variant
armorDamageUseStaminaForPC.hint: If enabled, any HP damage can affect armor. If disabled, armor damage only starts for the portion of HP damage below the PC threshold.

armorDamageThresholdPC.name: Homebrew: PC armor damage threshold (%)
armorDamageThresholdPC.hint: When Stamina mode is off, only HP damage below this percentage of max HP can damage armor.

armorDamageThresholdNPC.name: Homebrew: NPC armor damage threshold (%)
armorDamageThresholdNPC.hint: Only HP damage below this percentage of max HP can damage NPC armor.

showDurabilityAutoMessages.name: Homebrew: Show automation chat messages
showDurabilityAutoMessages.hint: Post chat summaries whenever these homebrew automations apply durability damage.

promptArmorDamagePhysicalConfirm.name: Homebrew: Prompt if HP loss was physical
promptArmorDamagePhysicalConfirm.hint: When enabled, every HP decrease asks if the hit was physical before applying armor durability damage. When disabled, armor damage applies automatically only when physical damage types are detected.

shieldBlockAutoPC.name: Homebrew: Shield Block automation (PCs)
shieldBlockAutoPC.hint: Adds a modal workflow when Shield Block is used: input incoming damage, then apply hardness-adjusted damage to both raised shield and actor.

shieldBlockAutoNPC.name: Homebrew: Shield Block automation (NPCs)
shieldBlockAutoNPC.hint: Same as the PC setting, but for NPC actors.

suppressArmourPotency.name: Suppress armour potency
suppressArmourPotency.hint: Disable fundamental runes on broken armour. Note: This feature conflicts with Automatic Bonus Progression.

suppressArmourResilient.name: Suppress armour resiliency
suppressArmourResilient.hint: Disable resilient runes on broken armour. Automatically disabled if potency is suppressed.

suppressArmourProperty.name: Suppress armour properties
suppressArmourProperty.hint: Disable property runes on broken armour. Automatically disabled if potency is suppressed.

suppressWeaponPotency.name: Suppress weapon potency
suppressWeaponPotency.hint: Disable fundamental runes on broken weapons. Note: This feature conflicts with Automatic Bonus Progression.

suppressWeaponStriking.name: Suppress weapon striking
suppressWeaponStriking.hint: Disable striking runes on broken weapons. Automatically disabled if potency is suppressed.

suppressWeaponProperty.name: Suppress weapon properties
suppressWeaponProperty.hint: Disable property runes on broken weapons. Automatically disabled if potency is suppressed.

restrictPreciousMaterial.name: Restrict precious material durability
restrictPreciousMaterial.hint: Apply precious material statistics only if the base item is less durable than the material.
